description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved acalabrutinib (tablets) for reimbursement as a monotherapy treatment option for the treatment of previously untreated adult patients with chronic lymphocytic leukemia (CLL) in the presence of 17p deletion or TP53 mutation who are unsuitable for chemoimmunotherapy.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute
